acceptance.baseline: Three banked GPU signatures reported missing BODY frame image failures on the same zwCtH harvest excerpt.
acceptance.after: Fresh local CPU repro used the identical 45-second excerpt (MD5 059e396317071e58478e75c55947fe6d), real tracks, frame plan, materializer, and production lookup. It materialized 1,200 frames; BODY requested 200; 18 were missing; lookup raised `missing BODY frame image for frame 75; expected body_frames/frame_000075.jpg`.
acceptance.target: Bank a pre-fix local repro with the exact missing BODY frame signature.

acceptance.metric: A2 root-cause commit and eval-vs-cold mechanism
acceptance.after: Root cause is b437b411886d7fe858e96136ce0d75fb46e95d32, outside the window. It introduced an independent 1,200-frame uniform materialization cap without guaranteeing retention of BODY's later independently selected frames. zwCtH has 1,315 tracked frames and loses 18 BODY requests. Fresh Wolverine has 244 materialized == 244 requested, so its cap never activates. Warm directories can mask the defect because `_stage_frames` skips on any cached JPEG without set validation.
acceptance.target: Name the introducing commit and mechanism, explaining the Wolverine asymmetry.

acceptance.metric: A3 post-fix equality for zwCtH and Wolverine
acceptance.baseline: zwCtH has 18 missing BODY-requested frames; Wolverine has zero.
acceptance.after: Not attempted because the mandatory outside-window kill rule fired.
acceptance.target: Zero missing frames and schedule/materialized equality for both clips.

honest_issues: The supplied regression window is disproven: the defective cap is present at both endpoints.
The supplied rev-9 success claim is unsupported by the banked w7 artifact, which records calibration failure before tracking, frames, or BODY.
A3-A5 remain unmet because the mandatory kill rule prohibited a fix, red-green verification, and wide suite.

Exact repro command: `PYTHONPATH=. MPLBACKEND=Agg .venv/bin/python runs/lanes/ns016_bodyframes_20260710/repro_real_clip.py`. Evidence is banked in `pre_fix_repro_attempt2.log` and `pre_fix_cold_zwcth45s_stride1/`.
BEST-STACK DELTA: (c) NO stack delta. No production code or manifest revision changed.
next: Manager ruling is required to authorize a follow-up outside the asserted window. The likely smallest repair is to materialize the exact BODY execution frame set and validate equality at the frames stage with a typed error, then add cold/reused/Wolverine regression coverage.
